topic: A chef preparing Hand-Pulled Lanzhou Ramen (Lamian).

parsed_generation.script:
[00:00-00:02] Shot 1: [Wide view of a chef at a lamian station, flour in the air, dough resting on a wooden board] - Camera: Wide, Framing: Wide, Movement: Static, Subject: Chef.
[00:02-00:05] Shot 2: [Close-up on the chef's hands pulling a long strand of dough into lamian noodles] - Camera: Close-up, Framing: Close, Movement: Static, Subject: Chef.
[00:05-00:08] Shot 3: [Medium shot of the chef presenting the finished lamian noodles in a bowl, steam rising] - Camera: Medium, Framing: Medium, Movement: Slow tracking, Subject: Chef.
parsed_generation.narration: The sequence opens with a wide view of the chef at a lamian station, flour drifting as dough rests on the board, establishing the craft in motion. In the second shot, a close-up captures the chef's hands deftly pulling a long strand of dough, revealing the hand-pulled technique that defines Lanzhou lamian. The final shot shifts to a medium view where the chef presents the finished noodles in a bowl, steam curling and signaling readiness. Across the three shots, the hand-pulled process is shown in real time, grounding the topic in tangible skill and focus.

feedback: The gold standard emphasizes a two-shot sequence focused on rolling and repetitive stretching to form hundreds of strands; the generated output uses three shots and adds a plating moment, which drifts from the minimal two-stage outline. To align, tighten the sequence to two timestamps (e.g., [00:00-00:04] and [00:04-00:08]), foreground the rolling and folding/doubling actions, and describe exponential strand formation more explicitly. Keep camera angles precise (wide to close-up on hands) and avoid extra elements like final plating unless it serves the core lamian-pulling narrative.
strengths: Clear, camera-based shot structure with explicit angles
Covers the hand-pulled technique and steam-presentation moment
fixes: Condense to the two-core actions of rolling and pulling, showing exponential N strands forming
Match the timestamp cadence and concise, action-first phrasing of the gold standard
